versions.version_description: Capo on 1st fret, standard chord names, cleaned up lyrics, chord alignment, and song structure.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
I was not comfortable with the chords I've found so far, so I just put the capo on 
1st fret and started from there with this great song.

Capo on 1st  fret

INTRO: [ch]A7[/ch]     [ch]A7sus4[/ch]      [ch]A7[/ch]

[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]               Cm13 [ch]B7[/ch]
Things haven't been the same[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]              Cm13 [ch]B7[/ch]
Since you came into my life[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]               Cm13 [ch]B7[/ch]
You found a way to touch my soul[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Gm7[/ch]
And I'm never, ever, ever gonna let it go[/tab]

BRIDGE:
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]         [ch]Gm7[/ch]               [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Happiness lies in your own hand[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]Am7[/ch]         [ch]Gm7[/ch]
It took me much too long to understand[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Dm7[/ch]
How it could be[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                [ch]Gm7[/ch]    [ch]Dm7[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]   Cm13 [ch]B7[/ch]
Until you shared your secret with me[/tab]

CHORUS:
Something's comin' over
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]    Cm13 [ch]B7[/ch]
Mmm mmm, Something's comin' over[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]    Cm13 [ch]B7[/ch]
mmm mmm, Something's comin' over[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]    Cm13 [ch]B7[/ch]                  [ch]Gm7[/ch]
mmm mmm, Something's comin' over me[/tab]

My baby's got a secret

You gave me back the paradise
That I thought I lost for good
You helped me find the reasons why
It took me by surprise that you understood
You knew all along
What I never wanted to say
Until I learned to love myself
I was never ever lovin' anybody else

BRIDGE
CHORUS 2x
BRIDGE
CHORUS 2x

Mmm mmm, my baby's got a secret
Mmm mmm, my baby's got a secret
Mmm mmm, my baby's got a secret for me

Mmm mmm, mmm mmm, mmm mmm...
